title: InvokeAI Serverless
description: InvokeAI on Runpod Serverless. The worker boots invokeai-web headless and proxies its session queue. Send an InvokeAI graph as the job payload, get a base64 PNG back, scales to zero between requests. No canvas. Models live on a network volume mounted at INVOKEAI_ROOT.

input.name: InvokeAI root
input.description: Data directory holding the model DB and installed models. Point this at a network volume so models persist across cold workers.

input.name: Boot timeout (seconds)
input.description: How long a cold worker waits for invokeai-web to answer before failing.

input.name: Job timeout (seconds)
input.description: Maximum wait for a single generation to finish.
